tool.name: runget
tool.summary: Discover a normalized public-run manifest through the governed archive acquisition seam

sections.title: Overview
sections.content: `runget` is part of the exposed EMBOSS-RS `archive_tools` cohort. This page is a generated baseline documentation stub produced through the governed autodoc path so the shipped tool surface remains fully documented even where richer harvested narrative or executable examples are still pending.

sections.title: Inputs
sections.content: This archive-facing tool accepts one governed ENA/SRA-style archive accession through the shared input-resolution seam. Provider qualification and bare-accession behaviour follow the documented archive acquisition policy for the implemented v1 subset.

sections.title: Outputs
sections.content: The current implementation emits structured archive metadata or normalized public-run manifest rows. Direct acquisition support is method-specific and explicitly documented where available.

sections.title: Current Status
sections.content: This method is implemented and exposed through `emboss-rs runget`. The generated tool page and the machine-readable validation stub at [`../validation/runget.validation.json`](../validation/runget.validation.json) are current. No richer autodoc examples are declared in this contract yet; future prompts should replace or extend this stub with harvested or executable evidence rather than hand-maintaining the generated page directly.

sections.title: Caveats
sections.content: Baseline stub coverage documents the exposed command surface and links to available validation evidence, but it does not imply that all historical EMBOSS examples, rendered screenshots, or legacy comparisons have been captured yet.
